allow: PowerShell($keep = @\('404','Common','Dashboard','Extension','FieldManagement','Login','Organization','Package','ResourceManagement','SettingAccount','User'\); Get-ChildItem "src\\pages" -Directory | Where-Object { $keep -notcontains $_.Name } | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $_.FullName }; Get-ChildItem "src\\pages" -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 7000 -State Listen | Select-Object -First 3 OwningProcess; Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 7000 -State Listen\).OwningProcess | Select-Object Id, ProcessName)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 26392 } | Format-List Id, Name, ProcessName, Path)
